title: T88
body:
**Welcome aboard the USS Vancouver!**

T88, named from an advanced in-hand tool in Star Trek: Lower Decks, is a lib-mod for shared classes of several mods.

Click ↗View source for more information. 

Visit [HoloJaneway](https://holojaneway.uss-shenzhou.cn/holojaneway/i) for docs.

Attention: This mod only functions as a library mod, DO NOT provide any actual gaming contents. Download it only when required.

Attention: If you want to install this mod to your game, do download the versions WITHOUT sources !

**欢迎登上联邦星舰温哥华号！**

T88的名称源于《星际迷航：下层甲板》中提到的一种先进的手持探测工具，在这里是一个库模组，用于存放可以在一些mod之间共享的类，而无需重复编写。

点击↗View source查看更多信息。

访问 [HoloJaneway](https://holojaneway.uss-shenzhou.cn/holojaneway/i) 阅读使用文档。

注意：此模组原则上不提供任何游戏内实际功能，请在其他模组需要时下载！

注意：如果你需要在游戏中使用此模组，请下载不带“sources”后缀的版本！
